# <Entity Name>

> File name: `<name>.entity.md`

## Purpose

Describe why this entity exists in the business domain.

## Identity

- `id`: describe the identifier and where it comes from.

## Attributes

- `attribute`: describe meaning, type, and owner.

## Invariants

- Rule that must always be true.

## State

- State name and meaning.

## Behavior

- Business operation this entity can perform or protect.

## Relationships

- Related entity or value object and why it matters.

## Domain Errors

- `ExampleDomainError`

## Open Questions

- Question that must be answered before implementation.
